title: GDP by Province, Iran (all 31 provinces + national total), 2000-2013
source_org: Iran Data Portal (Syracuse University), compiling Central Bank of Iran / Statistical Centre of Iran provincial accounts
units: million rial (nominal, current prices); per-capita file in rial per person
license_terms: Not specified by Iran Data Portal; academic/research reuse assumed (Syracuse University compilation of Iranian official statistics)
notes: Single national-level summary table format: one row per province (all 31 provinces) x one column per fiscal year, plus a 'Total Country' row. Verified via openpyxl: Sheet1 dimensions A1:O37, header 'Gross Domestic Product (million rial)', columns 2000-2001(1379) through 2013-2014(1392). This satisfies task 1a (compiled national table covering all 31 provinces) in preference to downloading 31 separate provincial yearbooks. Companion file excludes oil-sector value added (useful given Khuzestan/Bushehr GDP shares are oil-driven); per-capita file already divides by provincial population. No post-2013 update found on Iran Data Portal as of this retrieval -- amar.org.ir direct/Wayback check done separately for a more current 'provinces at a glance' table.
